name: modeled-information-format
description: The 'modeled-information-format' Claude Code plugin marketplace. Every plugin is SHA-pinned, scanned across the org's quality gates, and admitted to this catalog only when its attestations verify fail-closed.

plugins.name: mif-docs
plugins.description: MIF-first documentation skill suite: one skill per document genre (Diataxis, ADR, RFC/PEP, runbook, PRD, Kiro, arc42/C4, changelog) over a MIF L1->L3 floor.

plugins.name: modeled-information-format
plugins.description: Signed, SLSA-attested, fail-closed-verified releases — central reusable signing/seam/verify workflows and independent gh attestation verify.
